messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] CONFERENCE: R in Insurance early booking advantage ends 30 May
messages.subject_clean: CONFERENCE: R in Insurance early booking advantage ends 30 May
messages.body_plain:
Hi all,

The 4th R in Insurance conference will take place 11 July 2016 at Cass Business School London. 

The early booking advantage will end 30 May. Hurry, to secure your ticket. 

Program and further details on www.rininsurance.com. 

Regards

Markus

--
Markus Gesmann
Blog: http://www.magesblog.com
